2. Diarrhoea/Typhoid

0. Back  00. Main Menu

en_malaria.text:
MALARIA:
1. Causes
2. Symptoms
3. Prevention
4. Treatment
5. When to Visit Hospital
0. Back  00. Main Menu

1.text:
Causes: Bite from infected mosquito.
0. Back

2.text:
Symptoms: Fever, headache, chills, body weakness.
0. Back

3.text:
Prevention: Sleep under mosquito net. Clear stagnant water. Use mosquito repellent.
0. Back

4.text:
Treatment: Test before treatment. Use approved malaria drugs.
0. Back

5.text: Hospital Limit: Fever >24hrs? Visit nearest health center.
5.sms: If fever lasts more than 24 hours, visit the nearest health center immediately for malaria testing.

en_emergency.text:
EMERGENCY SIGNS:
Severe bleeding, breathing difficulty, unconsciousness, convulsions. Go to hospital NOW.
en_emergency.sms: EMERGENCY: Go to the hospital NOW if experiencing severe bleeding, breathing difficulty, or convulsions.
